displayData.name: Quarantine Default Inbound Block
displayData.description: This filter blocks any inbound non-loopback packets when the network was in quarantine state. The quarantine state was triggered by a network state change.

displayData.name: Quarantine Default Inbound Block
displayData.description: This filter blocks any inbound non-loopback packets when the network was in quarantine state. The quarantine state was triggered by a network state change.

displayData.name: Core Networking - Time Exceeded (ICMPv6-In)
displayData.description: Time Exceeded error messages are generated from any node that a packet traverses if the Hop Limit value is decremented to zero at any point on the path.

displayData.name: Core Networking - Destination Unreachable (ICMPv6-In)
displayData.description: Destination Unreachable error messages are sent from any node that a packet traverses which is unable to forward the packet for any reason except congestion.

displayData.name: Core Networking - Packet Too Big (ICMPv6-In)
displayData.description: Packet Too Big error messages are sent from any node that a packet traverses which is unable to forward the packet because the packet is too large for the next link.

displayData.name: Core Networking - Parameter Problem (ICMPv6-In)
displayData.description: Parameter Problem error messages are sent by nodes as a result of incorrectly generated packets.

displayData.name: Core Networking - Neighbor Discovery Advertisement (ICMPv6-In)
displayData.description: Neighbor Discovery Advertisement messages are sent by nodes to notify other nodes of link-layer address changes or in response to a Neighbor Discovery Solicitation request.

displayData.description: Neighbor Discovery Solicitations are sent by nodes to discover the link-layer address of another on-link IPv6 node.
